scope.summary: Triaged the original C3 stash set by stable stash message after the live stash stack shifted, with no stash mutation.
out_of_scope: Dropping, applying, popping, clearing, or otherwise removing any stash.
Pane 2's parked peer stash, currently message 'park peer beads export hunks during ws-b close', which was explicitly excluded from C3 triage material.
Any driver-repository stash triage or mutation.

entry_points.name: git stash list --date=iso
entry_points.trace: Re-read live stash stack after the operator warned that indices shifted. The pane-parked message 'park peer beads export hunks during ws-b close' was present at the top and excluded. The C3 set was keyed by message text rather than by unstable stash@{N} index.

entry_points.name: git stash show -p stash@{N} --stat
entry_points.trace: Read-only inspection was run over the current C3 index range after the shift, covering messages: d4-server-preserve-before-h6-20260720; WIP on release/v0.9.0: 6aa3174 test: align wallet mode expectations with driver support; temporary OCI IAM local-driver overlay after subject-mapping revalidation; temporary final OCI classic-IAM local driver override; temporary v6z2 local driver OCI override; temporary r2t0 OCI Legacy16 trace local-driver override; temporary r2t0 OCI revalidation StaticClientCert local-driver override; temporary r2t0 OCI diagnostics local-driver override and RUST_LOG pass-through; temporary r2t0 local-driver OCI validation full retry; temporary r2t0 local-driver OCI validation; K3-worker-offscope-wip-5c01862; WIP on main: 5c01862 chore(beads): close GATE-SEAL .16; w10 bead export not committed; w5 bead export not committed; w6b bead export not committed.

entry_points.name: message-keyed verdict list
entry_points.trace: Verdicts: d4-server-preserve-before-h6-20260720 = ALREADY LANDED because fuzz CI taxonomy entries are already in HEAD/history at a4fec26d/cb7ddfa0; WIP on release/v0.9.0: 6aa3174 test: align wallet mode expectations with driver support = OBSOLETE because it is old Cargo.lock churn superseded by current published-driver pinning; each temporary OCI local-driver override message = OBSOLETE because local rust-oracledb path overrides are dead by policy; K3-worker-offscope-wip-5c01862 = ALREADY LANDED because oracle_lineage live catalog cross-check symbols are in current tree/history at 70e744a9; WIP on main: 5c01862 chore(beads): close GATE-SEAL .16 = ALREADY LANDED because README release-version docs were landed/refined at 828955d5/be525cea/7ea7659a; w10/w5/w6b bead export not committed messages = ALREADY LANDED because those bead close exports are already reflected in the current tracker.

entry_points.name: no stash mutation
entry_points.trace: No git stash drop, git stash apply, git stash pop, git stash clear, or equivalent stash-mutating command was run. Removal remains operator-gated and awaits explicit operator authorization.

limitations: This is a read-only stash triage close, not a cleanup close: no stash was dropped, applied, popped, cleared, or removed.
Stash indices are volatile in this shared checkout; the durable verdict is keyed by stash message text, with current indices only incidental at inspection time.
Removal of any stash still awaits explicit operator authorization under AGENTS.md Rule 1.
Readiness remains not-ready because this close is based on manual/read-only review rather than a required-proof/v1 artifact.
